title: cactus latimamma
side_effects: Cactus latimamma can have side effects if used improperly, such as gastrointestinal problems, including nausea, vomiting, and diarrhea, due to its high concentration of toxic compounds like latimammalin. Prolonged exposure to these compounds can also cause liver damage and kidney failure in severe cases. Additionally, improper use of cactus latimamma can lead to allergic reactions, such as hives and itching, in some individuals. In rare instances, it may even trigger more serious conditions, like anaphylaxis, which requires immediate medical attention.
